home.headline: Where Broken Souls Learn to Love Again
home.intro1: They came to us broken. They leave us whole. Deep in Thailand's northeastern heartland, Saved Souls Foundation is more than a dog shelter—it's a second chance.
home.donateTitle: Your Money. Their Life. Total Transparency.
home.donateSubtitle: Every euro. Every soul. Every heartbeat counts. Choose your impact:
home.donate50: covers a sterilization campaign preventing 100+ unwanted litters
home.donate100: provides a custom wheelchair for a paralyzed pup
home.donateBreakdown: Where every baht goes: 70% direct animal care · 20% sterilization campaigns · 10% shelter maintenance
home.idealSubtitle: Secure payment via Mollie. Choose your preferred payment method on the checkout page.
home.mollieMethods: iDEAL · Credit card · Bancontact · Apple Pay · Klarna · and more
home.thaiPaymentsMethods: PromptPay · Scan QR · Kasikorn · Bangkok Bank · SCB · Krungthai · BankThai · TrueMoney · LINE Pay

thaiModal.qrInstruction: Scan with your bank app. Works with all Thai banks.
thaiModal.bankInstruction: Transfer from your bank app to the account below.
thaiModal.ewalletComingSoon: TrueMoney and LINE Pay coming soon.

feedAYear.title: Feed for a year
feedAYear.subtitle: €169 = one dog or cat fed for a whole year
feedAYear.metaDescription: Donate €169 and feed a dog or cat for a whole year at Saved Souls Foundation in Khon Kaen, Thailand.
feedAYear.feedDog: Feed a dog for a year
feedAYear.feedCat: Feed a cat for a year
feedAYear.disclaimer: Your donation goes directly to food for our 430 dogs and 91 cats. Every euro counts.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.subtitle: There are many ways to support Saved Souls Foundation. Choose what fits you.
getInvolved.metaDescription: Get involved with Saved Souls Foundation: donate, sponsor, volunteer, or adopt a rescued dog or cat in Khon Kaen, Thailand.
getInvolved.volunteerThailand: Volunteer with dogs and cats in Thailand

volunteer.title: Join the Furry Revolution!
volunteer.subtitle: Volunteer with Saved Souls Foundation
volunteer.intro: Get ready for the adventure of a lifetime! Our volunteers are the heartbeat of our mission—bringing hope, love, and second chances to hundreds of rescued dogs and cats. Warning: you'll get sweaty, dirty, and absolutely covered in puppy kisses. It's the best kind of exhaustion.
volunteer.locationText: Just 40 minutes from Khon Kaen City, Thailand. Grab a taxi (≈350 baht) or rent a motorbike and ride into paradise.
volunteer.need5: Minimum commitment: 2 weeks (We invest in training you—let's make it count!)
volunteer.morningText: Roll up your sleeves! Clean cages, wash bowls, feed hungry pups and kitties.
volunteer.afternoonText: The fun begins! Socialize, train, swim, and play with our furry residents. Watch their personalities bloom under your care.
volunteer.pack1: Clothes you don't mind getting dirty
volunteer.pack3: Small daypack for water and essentials
volunteer.sharedHouseText: Gender-separated rooms, communal living at its finest.
volunteer.bungalowsText: Available for those wanting their own space.
volunteer.commonAreasText: Enjoy our swimming pool and fully-equipped kitchen.
volunteer.meals2: Cook dinner together with fellow volunteers—we supply the ingredients!
volunteer.perksText: Free WiFi, free washing machines (bring your own detergent)
volunteer.brochureSuffix: for full details, then fill out the contact form.
volunteer.quote: Every dog deserves a hero. Could that be you?
volunteer.footer: Saved Souls Foundation | มูลนิธิเซฟต์ โซลส์
volunteer.footerTagline: Making tails wag, one volunteer at a time. 🐾

donate.title: Where Your Donations Go
donate.subtitle: Every euro helps feed and care for our rescued dogs and cats

dogFood.title: Monthly Dog Food
dogFood.intro1: With 430 dogs to feed we are always in need of food!
dogFood.intro2: Due to shortages of dry kibbles, we cook food for dogs every day and we use 2 large bags (100 kg) of rice mixed with meat or dry kibbles for the dogs. Our disabled and clinic dogs need special diets and extra food daily to help with their rehabilitation and to make them well again.
dogFood.intro3: We are always in need of rice, dry kibbles, canned dog food and treats.
dogFood.totalCost: Total costs for dog food: 72.000 baht per month
dogFood.cost3: • A box of canned dog food = 800 Baht
dogFood.cost4: Total costs for Rice = 42.000 Baht per month
dogFood.cost5: Total costs for Kibbles = 30.000 Baht per month
dogFood.cta: DONATE NOW — HELP FEED OUR DOGS →

catFood.title: Monthly Cat Food
catFood.intro1: At Saved Souls Foundation we also have a cat run where we take care of 91 cats, which were rescued from the streets or from bad situations. We love our furry friends, but we need your help to keep them fed and healthy. Donating cat food is always appreciated as cat food is expensive and we go through a lot of it every day.
catFood.intro2: We are always in need of tinned cat food, dry kibbles, treats and cat sand.
catFood.totalCost: Total costs for cat food and sand: around 15.000 baht per month
catFood.cost3: Total costs for Canned Food = 6.400 Baht per month
catFood.cost4: Total costs for Kibbles = 5.760 Baht per month
catFood.cost5: Total costs for Cat Sand = 3.000 Baht per month
catFood.cta: DONATE NOW — HELP FEED OUR CATS →

medical.title: Monthly Medical Donation
medical.intro1: Medical Support is what we lack the most, as certain essential medications and operations are expensive. Donors are the only ones who can help us support badly injured dogs and cats and organize sterilization events to avoid new unwanted pregnancies—as we already have too many street animals to save.
medical.intro2: We get daily requests to save badly injured dogs and cats!
medical.intro3: Unfortunately without funds we cannot always help the animals in need to get their surgery done, or they have to wait days or weeks before the surgery—which can alter the outcome.
medical.intro4: Any time, you can become the angel who will ease the pain of a deeply suffering dog or cat by donating to us.
medical.totalCost: Total costs for medical supplies and medication: around 15.000 baht per month
medical.cta: DONATE NOW — BE A MEDICAL ANGEL →

maintenance.title: Monthly Repair & Maintenance Donation
maintenance.sponsorTitle: Be Our Repair and Maintenance Sponsor
maintenance.intro1: Saved Souls Foundation was set up in 2017 and is home for 430 dogs and 91 cats. The foundation consists of multiple areas and runs equipped to take care of our dogs and cats. We also have a dog swimming pool for therapy and a fully equipped clinic as well.
maintenance.intro2: To keep running such a big-size sanctuary and keep it in good shape requires daily maintenance. Not a day passes without the need to fix something broken. When things are not broken, we also often need to improve them. This can be general repairs but also fixing the fences, doors and roofs to keep our animals safe and sound.
maintenance.intro3: Our staff is constantly busy taking care of the dogs, and keeping the sanctuary a safe place for them requires good materials to work with.
maintenance.intro4: We appreciate any amount that can be donated to keep our sanctuary a comfortable and secure home for our numerous animals.
maintenance.totalCost: Total costs for maintenance and repair: around 10.000 baht per month
maintenance.cta: DONATE NOW — HELP MAINTAIN OUR SANCTUARY →

staff.title: Monthly Staff Salary
staff.intro: Our lovely staff take great care of the dogs and cats in our shelter. They work hard every day to give these rescued animals the love and attention they deserve. We couldn't do this without their support. If you want to help our cooks and caretakers, please consider making a donation. Every bit counts!
staff.totalCost: Total staff costs: 120.000 baht per month

donate.comingSoon: More cost breakdowns (wheelchairs, swimming therapy) coming soon.

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.subtitle: A big thank you to everyone who has contributed or is contributing to our foundation.
thankYou.sponsorsText: Your monthly support funds wheelchairs, swimming therapy and fresh meals.
thankYou.donorsText: Every euro counts. Your donations save lives and give hope.
thankYou.adoptersText: You give our animals a second chance at a loving home.
thankYou.volunteersText: You are the heartbeat of our mission. Thank you for your time and dedication.
thankYou.founderMessage:
Dear Followers 💚

I am very pleased to announce to you all that Saved Souls Foundation has a new management.

Melanie de Wit will face this great challenge and I am sure that she will succeed. Her calm, thoughtful and determined nature will be a great asset to our foundation.

I personally will continue to support Melanie and help where help is needed.

My plans for the future are still open, but I will always have animals around me in my life.

I thank everyone for your loyalty to our animals and I am sure Melanie will do her job wonderfully.

Warm regards,
Gabriela 💚

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: Together we make the difference. These organisations stand alongside Saved Souls Foundation and help us give every animal a second chance.
partners.contactPrompt: Would your company or organisation like to become a partner too?
partners.becomePartnerText: By working together we increase our impact. Whether you're a business, foundation or association—together we save more animals.

streetDogsThailand.metaTitle: Street Dogs Thailand | Dog Shelter, Donate & Volunteer | Saved Souls
streetDogsThailand.metaDescription: Help street dogs in Thailand. Donate, volunteer or adopt. Dog shelter Khon Kaen - rescue street dogs, animal welfare Thailand.
streetDogsThailand.metaKeywords: dog shelter Thailand, street dogs Thailand, rescue dogs Thailand, donate dog shelter, volunteer Thailand dogs, animal welfare Thailand, help stray dogs, Thai dog rescue, adopt dogs Thailand, support animal shelter
streetDogsThailand.title: Thailand: Far Away, Yet Their Suffering is Closer Than You Think
streetDogsThailand.intro: Thousands of kilometers from home. Exotic beaches, golden temples, smiling faces. But behind those postcard-perfect images lies a harsh reality that thousands of street dogs face every single day.
streetDogsThailand.realityTitle: Real Suffering. Real Pain. Real Help Needed.
streetDogsThailand.reality1: These are not statistics. These are lives.
streetDogsThailand.reality2: Picture this: a mother dog desperately searching for food in garbage heaps for her puppies. An old dog, once someone's loyal friend, dying alone on the street. Puppies with skin diseases, too weak to bark, too exhausted to fight for their lives anymore.
streetDogsThailand.reality3: This is happening. Every day. Right now.
streetDogsThailand.reality4: Thailand doesn't have the widespread animal welfare infrastructure we take for granted. Dogs are born on the streets, survive on the streets, and die on the streets - often after a lifetime of pain, hunger, and fear. Without your help, this cycle continues endlessly.
streetDogsThailand.whyThailand1: "Why help so far away?" we often hear. Because suffering has no passport. Because compassion knows no borders. And because these dogs literally have no one else.
streetDogsThailand.whyThailand2: In Western countries, there are systems, laws, and structures. In Thailand? We ARE that system. We are their only chance.
streetDogsThailand.whyThailand3: Distance doesn't make suffering less real. It makes our help even more crucial.
streetDogsThailand.everySoul1: We are a private animal shelter located deep in the heart of Thailand. Here, dogs rescued from the illegal dog meat trade, abusive situations, and accidents—as well as other animals—have found a new loving home. Many arrive so traumatised that they have lost all trust in humans.
streetDogsThailand.everySoul2: It may take years of intensive socialisation before these dogs are ready to trust again. But we never give up. Every soul deserves a second chance.
streetDogsThailand.loveHome1: At Saved Souls Foundation, we believe every animal deserves love, care, and a safe place to call home. Our dedicated staff and volunteers ensure our dogs and cats receive the affection and attention they need—from daily walks with as many dogs as possible to bonding time with our cats in our cozy cat shelter.
streetDogsThailand.loveHome2: For our disabled dogs, we provide wheelchairs and access to a large dog park where they can play, explore, and enjoy the fresh air. The other dogs are taken for relaxing walks in the peaceful surroundings of our foundation.
streetDogsThailand.provideCare1: Our on-site veterinarian offers daily medical care, including sterilizations, amputations, and treatment for blood parasites, liver diseases, and other illnesses affecting our rescued animals.
streetDogsThailand.provideCare2: For more complex surgeries or specialised procedures, we take our animals to Khon Kaen University Animal Hospital or other professional veterinary clinics.
streetDogsThailand.adoption1: We help dogs find loving homes both locally and across the country. With dedicated care, love, and training, we make sure every dog is leash-trained before joining their new family. We also host adoption events where potential owners can meet their future companions in person.
streetDogsThailand.adoption2: Want to join one? Subscribe to our newsletter or follow us on Facebook and Instagram for the latest updates!
streetDogsThailand.adoption3: Looking to adopt a dog or cat? You're always welcome to visit our shelter—just
streetDogsThailand.adoptionContactLink: contact us to schedule an appointment
streetDogsThailand.adoption4: Every adoption is one less soul on the streets. Give an animal the loving home they deserve.
streetDogsThailand.donationImpactIntro: Every dollar you give becomes a meal. A vaccination. A surgery. A second chance. What your donation means:
streetDogsThailand.donation25: Vaccinates a puppy against deadly diseases
streetDogsThailand.donation50: Spays/neuters a dog (preventing dozens of street puppies)
streetDogsThailand.donation100: Rescues a dog from the street with complete medical care
streetDogsThailand.volunteerTitle: Come Volunteer - Transform Your Own Life
streetDogsThailand.volunteer1: Want to do more than donate? Come to Thailand. Hug dogs who have never known love. Look into eyes learning to hope again. Many volunteers call it "the most meaningful experience of their lives."
streetDogsThailand.volunteer2: You don't need experience. You just need a heart and hands willing to help. Volunteer work includes:
streetDogsThailand.giveGenerouslyTitle: Give Generously - Because They Deserve Everything
streetDogsThailand.giveGenerously1: We're not asking for your coffee money. We're asking for your compassion. Your generosity. To give like these dogs would give if they could: unconditionally, completely, with their whole hearts.
streetDogsThailand.giveGenerously2: Every gift counts. Every donation saves. Every contribution changes a life.
streetDogsThailand.ctaTitle: Donate Now - Tomorrow May Be Too Late
streetDogsThailand.ctaText: While you read this, there's a dog who is hungry. Who is in pain. Who is waiting for help. Your help. Make a difference today. Give hope. Give a future. Give life.
streetDogsThailand.photosAlt: Rescued dog at Saved Souls Foundation Thailand
streetDogsThailand.photosQuestion: Will we stay invisible or can you help?
streetDogsThailand.purpose1: Our goal? Fewer street animals—more lives saved. Through adoption, we give dogs and cats a home. Here in Thailand. Now.
streetDogsThailand.purpose2: We give disabled dogs a second chance. After they recover, we help them find loving families. Every adoption is one less soul on the streets.
streetDogsThailand.purpose3: We are expanding our sterilization projects—the most effective way to stop uncontrolled breeding and prevent further suffering. Together with local authorities, we aim to create lasting change.
streetDogsThailand.purpose4: Only by working together can we truly transform the lives of street dogs and cats.
streetDogsThailand.purpose5: For us, every soul is precious. We do everything we can. We are their voice—standing by them, supporting them, showing them they are not alone. We may not save them all. But for every soul we do save, their whole world changes.
streetDogsThailand.shareTitle: Help street dogs in Thailand - Saved Souls Foundation
streetDogsThailand.shareText: Thousands of street dogs in Thailand need your help. Donate, volunteer or adopt. Together we save lives.
